title: schoenus subflavus
intro: Schoenus subflavus, also known as yellow-fringed sedge, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, skin conditions, and wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Schoenus subflavus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the healing of wounds. In herbal preparations, Schoenus subflavus is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or topical creams, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
